Online Supplementary Materials

Juan C. Correa

2026-07-15

Appendix A. Data preprocessing and AOI-to-AOI network reconstruction

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(igraph)
library(knitr)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(nnet)
library(pscl)

Load raw data

Secuencia <- read_delim(
  "Secuencia.csv",
  delim = ";",
  escape_double = FALSE,
  trim_ws = TRUE
)
## New names:
## Rows: 7542 Columns: 12
## ── Column specification
## ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Delimiter: ";" chr
## (4): Condicion, ChosenCondition, NombreEstimulo, NombreSeleccionado dbl (8):
## ...1, Sujeto, Posicion, Ensayo, Area, Dwell, Secuencia, Tempos
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data. ℹ
## Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
## • `` -> `...1`
AreasInteres <- read_csv("AreasInteres.csv")
## Rows: 27 Columns: 2
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr (1): Nombre area
## dbl (1): Area
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
Secuencia <- Secuencia %>%
  left_join(
    AreasInteres,
    by = "Area"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    -Area
  ) %>%
  rename(
    Area = `Nombre area`
  )

AOI-to-AOI network reconstruction

build_aoi_network <- function(df){

  df <- df[order(df$Secuencia), ]

  areas <- df$Area

  if(length(areas) < 2){
    return(NULL)
  }

  ####################################################
  # EARLY VISUAL EXPLORATION
  ####################################################

  FirstAOI <- as.character(
    areas[1]
  )

  FirstTransition <- paste0(
    areas[1],
    "_",
    areas[2]
  )

  First3AOIs <- paste(
    head(areas, 3),
    collapse = "_"
  )

  ####################################################
  # AOI-TO-AOI NETWORK
  ####################################################

  edges <- data.frame(
    from = head(areas, -1),
    to   = tail(areas, -1)
  )

  edges_weighted <- edges %>%
    count(
      from,
      to,
      name = "weight"
    )

  g <- graph_from_data_frame(
    edges_weighted,
    directed = TRUE
  )

  E(g)$weight <- edges_weighted$weight

  ####################################################
  # AOI VISITS
  ####################################################

  node_freq <- table(areas)

  V(g)$visits <- as.numeric(
    node_freq[
      match(
        V(g)$name,
        names(node_freq)
      )
    ]
  )

  ####################################################
  # TRANSITION ENTROPY
  ####################################################

  probs <- edges_weighted$weight /
    sum(edges_weighted$weight)

  Entropy <- -sum(
    probs * log2(probs)
  )

  ####################################################
  # OUTPUT
  ####################################################

  return(
    list(
      graph = g,
      edges = edges,
      edges_weighted = edges_weighted,
      node_freq = node_freq,

      FirstAOI = FirstAOI,
      FirstTransition = FirstTransition,
      First3AOIs = First3AOIs,

      Entropy = Entropy
    )
  )
}

Reconstruct all participant-trial networks

NetworkList <- list()

TrajectoryFeatures <- data.frame()

subjects <- unique(
  Secuencia$Sujeto
)

for(s in subjects){

  data_s <- filter(
    Secuencia,
    Sujeto == s
  )

  ensayos <- unique(
    data_s$Ensayo
  )

  for(e in ensayos){

    data_se <- filter(
      data_s,
      Ensayo == e
    )

    net <- build_aoi_network(
      data_se
    )

    if(!is.null(net)){

      nombre <- paste0(
        "S",
        s,
        "_E",
        e
      )

      NetworkList[[nombre]] <- net

      TrajectoryFeatures <- rbind(
        TrajectoryFeatures,
        data.frame(
          Sujeto = s,
          Ensayo = e,

          Choice = unique(
            data_se$ChosenCondition
          ),

          FirstAOI = net$FirstAOI,
          FirstTransition = net$FirstTransition,
          First3AOIs = net$First3AOIs,

          Nodes = gorder(
            net$graph
          ),

          Edges = gsize(
            net$graph
          ),

          Entropy = net$Entropy,

          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      )

    }
  }
}

summary(
  TrajectoryFeatures
)
##      Sujeto          Ensayo             Choice         FirstAOI  
##  Min.   :101.0   Min.   : 0.000   Length   :761   Length   :761  
##  1st Qu.:111.0   1st Qu.: 4.000   N.unique :  3   N.unique : 24  
##  Median :123.0   Median : 9.000   N.blank  :  0   N.blank  :  0  
##  Mean   :168.4   Mean   : 9.382   Min.nchar:  4   Min.nchar: 11  
##  3rd Qu.:135.0   3rd Qu.:14.000   Max.nchar: 11   Max.nchar: 30  
##  Max.   :999.0   Max.   :19.000                                  
##   FirstTransition     First3AOIs      Nodes            Edges       
##  Length   :761    Length   :761   Min.   : 1.000   Min.   : 1.000  
##  N.unique :198    N.unique :392   1st Qu.: 3.000   1st Qu.: 4.000  
##  N.blank  :  0    N.blank  :  0   Median : 5.000   Median : 7.000  
##  Min.nchar: 23    Min.nchar: 23   Mean   : 5.332   Mean   : 7.444  
##  Max.nchar: 59    Max.nchar: 88   3rd Qu.: 7.000   3rd Qu.:10.000  
##                                   Max.   :17.000   Max.   :33.000  
##     Entropy     
##  Min.   :0.000  
##  1st Qu.:2.000  
##  Median :2.585  
##  Mean   :2.540  
##  3rd Qu.:3.170  
##  Max.   :5.003

Appendix B. AOI visitation frequencies

all_aois <- bind_rows(
  lapply(
    NetworkList,
    function(x){

      data.frame(
        AOI = names(
          x$node_freq
        ),
        Visits = as.numeric(
          x$node_freq
        )
      )

    }
  )
)

freq_tab <- all_aois %>%
  group_by(AOI) %>%
  summarise(
    Visits = sum(Visits)
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    desc(Visits)
  )

kable(
  freq_tab,
  caption = "AOI visitation frequencies."
)
AOI visitation frequencies.
AOI Visits
Image (Central) 1711
Image (Top) 1616
Image (Bottom) 1317
Price (Top) 430
Price (Bottom) 333
Price (Central) 277
Location score (Central) 235
Location score (Top) 171
Number of Comments (Central) 148
Location score (Bottom) 146
Review score number (Top) 134
Number of Comments (Top) 130
Review score number (Bottom) 98
Review score letters (Bottom) 94
Review score number (Central) 91
Review score letters (Central) 86
Review score letters (Top) 85
Dist to City Center (Central) 79
Stars Rating (Central) 73
Dist to City Center (Top) 72
Number of Comments (Bottom) 72
Dist to City Center (Bottom) 60
Stars Rating (Bottom) 39
Stars Rating (Top) 20 
ggplot(
  freq_tab,
  aes(
    reorder(AOI, Visits),
    Visits
  )
)+
  geom_col(
    fill = "darkgreen"
  )+
  coord_flip()+
  theme_minimal()+
  labs(
    x = "AOI",
    y = "Visits"
  )

Appendix C. AOI-to-AOI transition heatmap

Aggregate transitions

all_edges <- bind_rows(
  lapply(
    NetworkList,
    function(x){
      x$edges
    }
  )
)

agg_edges <- all_edges %>%
  count(
    from,
    to,
    name = "weight"
  )

Transition matrix

mat <- xtabs(
  weight ~ from + to,
  data = agg_edges
)

mat

##   Number of Comments (Top)                           0                      1
##   Price (Bottom)                                     3                      1
##   Price (Central)                                    1                      0
##   Price (Top)                                        3                      2
##   Review score letters (Bottom)                      1                      1
##   Review score letters (Central)                     0                      1
##   Review score letters (Top)                         0                      2
##   Review score number (Bottom)                       2                      0
##   Review score number (Central)                      0                      0
##   Review score number (Top)                          0                      2
##   Stars Rating (Bottom)                              1                      0
##   Stars Rating (Central)                             0                      1
##   Stars Rating (Top)                                 0                      3
##                                 to
## from                             Stars Rating (Top)
##   Dist to City Center (Bottom)                    0
##   Dist to City Center (Central)                   1
##   Dist to City Center (Top)                       0
##   Image (Bottom)                                  1
##   Image (Central)                                 3
##   Image (Top)                                     2
##   Location score (Bottom)                         0
##   Location score (Central)                        1
##   Location score (Top)                            1
##   Number of Comments (Bottom)                     0
##   Number of Comments (Central)                    0
##   Number of Comments (Top)                        1
##   Price (Bottom)                                  0
##   Price (Central)                                 0
##   Price (Top)                                     1
##   Review score letters (Bottom)                   0
##   Review score letters (Central)                  0
##   Review score letters (Top)                      0
##   Review score number (Bottom)                    1
##   Review score number (Central)                   0
##   Review score number (Top)                       0
##   Stars Rating (Bottom)                           0
##   Stars Rating (Central)                          1
##   Stars Rating (Top)                              0

Hierarchical clustering heatmap

pheatmap(
  mat,
  clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
  clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean",
  clustering_method = "ward.D2",
  color = colorRampPalette(
    c(
      "white",
      "darkgreen"
    )
  )(100)
)

Export figure

png(
  "F2.png",
  width = 5000,
  height = 3500,
  units = "px",
  res = 600
)

pheatmap(
  mat,
  clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
  clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean",
  clustering_method = "ward.D2",
  color = colorRampPalette(
    c(
      "white",
      "darkgreen"
    )
  )(100)
)

dev.off()

Appendix D. Multiverse analysis

Chi-square tests

tabla_firstAOI <- table(
  TrajectoryFeatures$FirstAOI,
  TrajectoryFeatures$Choice
)

test_firstAOI <- chisq.test(
  tabla_firstAOI
)
## Warning in chisq.test(tabla_firstAOI): Chi-squared approximation may be
## incorrect
tabla_firstTransition <- table(
  TrajectoryFeatures$FirstTransition,
  TrajectoryFeatures$Choice
)

test_firstTransition <- chisq.test(
  tabla_firstTransition
)
## Warning in chisq.test(tabla_firstTransition): Chi-squared approximation may be
## incorrect
tabla_first3 <- table(
  TrajectoryFeatures$First3AOIs,
  TrajectoryFeatures$Choice
)

test_first3 <- chisq.test(
  tabla_first3
)
## Warning in chisq.test(tabla_first3): Chi-squared approximation may be incorrect

ANOVAs

anova_nodes <- summary(
  aov(
    Nodes ~ Choice,
    data = TrajectoryFeatures
  )
)

anova_edges <- summary(
  aov(
    Edges ~ Choice,
    data = TrajectoryFeatures
  )
)

anova_entropy <- summary(
  aov(
    Entropy ~ Choice,
    data = TrajectoryFeatures
  )
)

Summary table

multiverse_results <- data.frame(
  Universe = c(
    "FirstAOI",
    "FirstTransition",
    "First3AOIs",
    "Nodes",
    "Edges",
    "Entropy"
  ),

  Test = c(
    "Chi-square",
    "Chi-square",
    "Chi-square",
    "ANOVA",
    "ANOVA",
    "ANOVA"
  ),

  Pvalue = c(
    test_firstAOI$p.value,
    test_firstTransition$p.value,
    test_first3$p.value,
    anova_nodes[[1]][
      "Choice",
      "Pr(>F)"
    ],
    anova_edges[[1]][
      "Choice",
      "Pr(>F)"
    ],
    anova_entropy[[1]][
      "Choice",
      "Pr(>F)"
    ]
  )
)

kable(
  multiverse_results,
  digits = 4,
  caption = "Multiverse analysis of visual exploration."
)
Multiverse analysis of visual exploration.
Universe Test Pvalue
FirstAOI Chi-square 0.1142
FirstTransition Chi-square 0.1985
First3AOIs Chi-square 0.6125
Nodes ANOVA 0.6237
Edges ANOVA 0.1928
Entropy ANOVA 0.2662

Appendix E. Multinomial predictive models

TrajectoryFeatures$Choice <- as.factor(
  TrajectoryFeatures$Choice
)

Model estimation

m1 <- multinom(
  Choice ~ Entropy,
  data = TrajectoryFeatures,
  trace = FALSE
)

m2 <- multinom(
  Choice ~ Entropy + FirstAOI,
  data = TrajectoryFeatures,
  trace = FALSE
)

m3 <- multinom(
  Choice ~ Entropy + FirstTransition,
  data = TrajectoryFeatures,
  trace = FALSE
)

m4 <- multinom(
  Choice ~ Nodes + Edges + Entropy,
  data = TrajectoryFeatures,
  trace = FALSE
)

Comparative performance table

results_models <- data.frame(
  Model = c(
    "M1",
    "M2",
    "M3",
    "M4"
  ),

  Predictors = c(
    "Entropy",
    "FirstAOI + Entropy",
    "FirstTransition + Entropy",
    "Nodes + Edges + Entropy"
  ),

  McFadden_R2 = c(
    pR2(m1)["McFadden"],
    pR2(m2)["McFadden"],
    pR2(m3)["McFadden"],
    pR2(m4)["McFadden"]
  ),

  AIC = c(
    AIC(m1),
    AIC(m2),
    AIC(m3),
    AIC(m4)
  )
)
## fitting null model for pseudo-r2
## fitting null model for pseudo-r2
## fitting null model for pseudo-r2
## fitting null model for pseudo-r2
results_models <- results_models %>%
  mutate(
    McFadden_R2 = round(
      McFadden_R2,
      4
    ),
    AIC = round(
      AIC,
      1
    )
  )

kable(
  results_models,
  caption =
    "Comparative performance of multinomial models predicting booking decisions from alternative representations of visual exploration."
)
Comparative performance of multinomial models predicting booking decisions from alternative representations of visual exploration.
Model Predictors McFadden_R2 AIC
M1 Entropy 0.0016 1676.7
M2 FirstAOI + Entropy 0.0414 1702.2
M3 FirstTransition + Entropy 0.2926 1978.3
M4 Nodes + Edges + Entropy 0.0034 1681.7
